name: notes-app
description: NoteVault — Full-stack notes app (Vue 3 + Express + SQLite)

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,APP" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
